# Baseline Arm — Plain Claude — Profile C1 (ML/AI + Automotive/Robotics)

**Run date:** 2026-06-28
**Method:** Plain Claude prompt — no SKILL.md, no backbone, one generic web search allowed
**Prompt used:**
> "You are a helpful assistant. Which companies in Baden-Württemberg could a student with
> this profile write a Master's thesis at? Profile: interests in computer vision and
> reinforcement learning; domain is automotive and robotics; looking for applied/empirical
> thesis work with a working system as deliverable; Python, PyTorch, ROS skills;
> no-gos: pure hardware without ML/software layer."

---

## Response (plain Claude, no structured skill execution)

Based on your profile in computer vision, reinforcement learning, and autonomous systems, here are Baden-Württemberg companies that would be natural thesis partners:

**Large automotive corporates (strongest structured programs):**

1. **Robert Bosch GmbH (Stuttgart)** — The Bosch Center for AI (BCAI) is one of Germany's premier industrial AI labs. Strong in computer vision and RL for robotics/automotive applications. Thesis program well-established; apply via jobs.bosch.de (search "Abschlussarbeit").

2. **Mercedes-Benz AG (Stuttgart)** — Large R&D presence in autonomous driving and AI. Has explicit thesis programs for students. Check group.mercedes-benz.com/careers/students/.

3. **Porsche AG (Weissach/Stuttgart)** — R&D center in Weissach does autonomous driving and ADAS work. Thesis opportunities across departments via jobs.porsche.com.

4. **ZF Friedrichshafen AG (Friedrichshafen)** — Major Tier-1 automotive supplier with active ML research in autonomous driving and sensor fusion. Check their student portal.

**Tech-forward automotive adjacent:**

5. **Daimler Truck AG (Stuttgart)** — Autonomous truck technology is an active research area. Student program exists.

**Robotics startups (Cyber Valley ecosystem):**

6. **NEURA Robotics (Metzingen)** — Humanoid robotics startup with active research in computer vision and reinforcement learning for manipulation. Growing fast, check careers page.

**Note:** The Cyber Valley ecosystem around Tübingen/Stuttgart also has many smaller AI/robotics startups that may host thesis students — browse cybervalley.de/ecosystem for a fuller list.

For automotive companies, apply to thesis programs 4–6 months in advance via their career portals. For startups, direct outreach to the research team is usually more effective.

---

*Note on execution:* Plain Claude retrieved from memory knowledge about BW automotive companies. One web search was skipped (baseline runs with minimal search, relying on parametric knowledge). Companies named are drawn from training-data recall of known BW automotive/tech players, not from a structured backbone filter or live web enrichment.
